data.name: CODE: PANDORA 2
data.detailed_description:
Code: Pandora 2: Absolute Weapon

Immerse yourself in the galaxy of Pandora—a world of eroticism, intrigue, and shadowy games, where passion becomes a weapon and power is seized through seduction and danger.
Play as Dripli, the chief diplomat of the Dark Lord, and Lika, a space marine. Conquer the galaxy not only with words, but with your body; negotiate with the rulers of Pandora and decide: will you surrender to temptation, or walk the ruthless path of strength?
Your choices will determine the fate of the entire universe.

Code: Pandora is an adult sci-fi visual novel with erotic RPG elements, where diplomacy, debauchery, and violence weave together in a web of intrigue, power, and desire.

As Dripli—a seductive and clever heroine—you will set out into the depraved galaxy of Pandora to unravel the secret of the Absolute Weapon, an artifact capable of changing the fate of worlds.
But on your way stand nine rulers of Pandora, each encounter becoming a balance of passion, political games, and personal temptation.

Key Features:
  • Deep story and non-linearity: Your decisions—at the negotiating table, in bed, or on the battlefield—shape the story’s outcome, your relationships with characters, and the final ending.
  • Interactive dialogues with the rulers of the galaxy: From refined diplomacy and psychological games to direct seduction and harsh threats.
  • Erotic scenes and adult themes, intertwined with mysticism and dark science fiction.
  • Complex system of moral choices: Choose the path of seduction, friendship, betrayal, or war—and decide who is worthy of power and pleasure.
  • Technology, magic, and deviant aesthetics: Encounter a gallery of deviant modified beauties, cybernetic monsters, and mysterious artifacts.
  • Darkwave soundtrack, erotic and atmospheric CG scenes.

Gameplay

Dialogue choices and interactive scenes.
Experience a path of seduction, threats, and negotiations—choose your lines, emotions, and tactics to achieve your goals, sway the rulers to your side, or provoke them into war and passion.

Influence on the story and world.
Every decision you make—in dialogue, on a mission, or in intimate scenes—affects the game’s outcome, relationships between characters, loyalty, and level of aggression.
Your sexual victories and defeats are all part of a grand political intrigue.

Tactical and combat episodes.
Take control of Lika in combat scenes: fight monsters and androids, defend your base from assaults.

Collecting trophies, artifacts, and secrets.
Explore locations, collect unique items, and uncover ancient artifacts.

WARNING!
This game is intended for adults only. Contains explicit scenes, BDSM, sexual transformations, and philosophical themes exploring pleasure, freedom, and control.

data.short_description: Immerse yourself in the galaxy of Pandora—a world of eroticism, intrigue, and shadowy games, where passion becomes a weapon and power is seized through seduction and danger.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 俄文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WIN10/11
  • 處理器: 2.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 5 1024Vram
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WIN10/11
  • 處理器: 2.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GEFORCE GTX 10
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Manjaro 23
  • 處理器: 2.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 5 1024Vram
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Manjaro 23
  • 處理器: 2.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GEFORCE GTX 10
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
